requirement_topic.en: Battery Producer-Responsibility, Labelling and Eco-Design — Cambodia Position
requirement_topic.zh: 电池生产者责任、标签与生态设计——柬埔寨情况
requirement_topic.zht: 電池生產者責任、標籤與生態設計——柬埔寨情況

summary.en: Cambodia does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal battery regime equivalent to Regulation （EU） 2023/1542. There is no national battery passport, carbon-footprint declaration, recycled-content threshold, or extended-producer-responsibility （EPR） registration specific to batteries that Chinese exporters must satisfy for market entry. Battery products instead fall under the general standards and conformity framework administered by the Institute of Standards of Cambodia （ISC）, which adopts CS standards based on IEC and ASEAN references, plus general consumer-protection, labelling, and import-inspection rules. Practical obligations are therefore product safety （CS/IEC 62133）, accurate product labelling for the importer/customs, and any applicable hazardous-substance or environmental controls administered at the general environmental level rather than through a dedicated battery law.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨并未实施相当于法规（EU）2023/1542的欧盟式横向电池制度。不存在中国出口商进入市场所必须满足的、针对电池的国家电池护照、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或延伸生产者责任（EPR）注册。电池产品转而纳入柬埔寨标准局（ISC）管理的通用标准与合格评定框架，该框架基于IEC及东盟参考制定CS标准，并辅以通用消费者保护、标签和进口检验规则。因此实际义务为产品安全（CS/IEC 62133）、面向进口商/海关的准确产品标签，以及在通用环境层面（而非专门电池法）管理的任何适用有害物质或环境管控。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨並未實施相當於法規（EU）2023/1542的歐盟式橫向電池制度。不存在中國出口商進入市場所必須滿足的、針對電池的國家電池護照、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或延伸生產者責任（EPR）登記。電池產品轉而納入柬埔寨標準局（ISC）管理的通用標準與合格評定框架，該框架基於IEC及東盟參考制定CS標準，並輔以通用消費者保護、標籤和進口檢驗規則。因此實際義務為產品安全（CS/IEC 62133）、面向進口商/海關的準確產品標籤，以及在通用環境層面（而非專門電池法）管理的任何適用有害物質或環境管控。

standards_or_laws: Institute of Standards of Cambodia （ISC） — Cambodian Standards （CS） and conformity framework
General consumer-protection and import-labelling rules （Ministry of Commerce）
No EU-style horizontal battery regulation equivalent to Regulation （EU） 2023/1542

summary.en: China regulates portable lithium battery packs and power banks mainly through the product-safety standard GB 31241 （Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment）, with CCC certification applying where the product or its host equipment is in the CCC catalogue. China does not impose an EU-style battery passport or recycled-content mandate on exported batteries; domestic recycling/EPR duties are separate and do not transfer to the importing market.
summary.zh: 中国对便携式锂电池组和移动电源主要通过产品安全标准GB 31241（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求）进行管理，当产品或其宿主设备列入CCC目录时适用CCC认证。中国对出口电池不施加欧盟式电池护照或再生材料含量强制要求；国内回收/生产者责任义务为单独规定，不会转移至进口市场。
summary.zht: 中國對便攜式鋰電池組和行動電源主要通過產品安全標準GB 31241（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求）進行管理，當產品或其宿主設備列入CCC目錄時適用CCC認證。中國對出口電池不施加歐盟式電池護照或再生材料含量強制要求；國內回收/生產者責任義務為單獨規定，不會轉移至進口市場。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment （SAC/SAMR）
CCC （China Compulsory Certification） where the product or host equipment is catalogue-listed

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Cambodia has no dedicated battery passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content, or battery-specific EPR obligation, so there is no EU-style horizontal regime for exporters to meet here. The practical gap is narrower: align documentation with the ISC conformity/import-inspection framework, ensure accurate product labelling for the importer and customs, and rely on the cell-safety row （CS/IEC 62133） for the substantive technical demonstration. Chinese GB 31241 reports support engineering analysis but are not automatically accepted as ISC conformity evidence and may need re-testing or recognition to a CS/IEC basis.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，柬埔寨没有专门的电池护照、碳足迹、再生材料含量或针对电池的EPR义务，因此此处出口商无需满足欧盟式横向制度。实际差距较小：使文件与ISC合格评定/进口检验框架对接，确保面向进口商和海关的准确产品标签，并依靠电芯安全条目（CS/IEC 62133）完成实质技术论证。中国GB 31241报告可支持工程分析，但不会自动被接受为ISC合格评定证据，可能需要按CS/IEC基础重新测试或获得认可。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，柬埔寨沒有專門的電池護照、碳足跡、再生材料含量或針對電池的EPR義務，因此此處出口商無需滿足歐盟式橫向制度。實際差距較小：使文件與ISC合格評定/進口檢驗框架對接，確保面向進口商和海關的準確產品標籤，並依靠電芯安全條目（CS/IEC 62133）完成實質技術論證。中國GB 31241報告可支持工程分析，但不會自動被接受為ISC合格評定證據，可能需要按CS/IEC基礎重新測試或獲得認可。

mandatory_status.target: No battery-specific horizontal regime — general ISC standards/conformity, consumer-protection and import-labelling rules apply; no EU-style battery passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content or battery EPR mandate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241 product-safety compliance required for portable lithium batteries sold in China; CCC where catalogue-listed

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodia does not impose an EU-style horizontal battery regulation, so the battery-passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content and battery-EPR obligations seen in the EU lane do not apply. Exporters should instead satisfy ISC conformity/import-inspection requirements, use accurate product labelling, and demonstrate cell safety to a CS/IEC 62133 basis. Chinese GB 31241 testing supports the technical file but is not by itself an ISC market-access approval. Verify current ISC and Ministry of Commerce requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨不实施欧盟式横向电池法规，因此欧盟通道中的电池护照、碳足迹、再生材料含量及电池EPR义务在此不适用。出口商应转而满足ISC合格评定/进口检验要求，使用准确的产品标签，并按CS/IEC 62133基础论证电芯安全。中国GB 31241测试可支持技术文件，但本身不构成ISC市场准入批准。发货前请核实ISC及商业部的现行要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨不實施歐盟式橫向電池法規，因此歐盟通道中的電池護照、碳足跡、再生材料含量及電池EPR義務在此不適用。出口商應轉而滿足ISC合格評定/進口檢驗要求，使用準確的產品標籤，並按CS/IEC 62133基礎論證電芯安全。中國GB 31241測試可支持技術文件，但本身不構成ISC市場准入批准。發貨前請核實ISC及商業部的現行要求。
